description:
BEST FANTECH EG3 WIRED EARPHONES IN BD

The Fantech EG3 Wired Earphones, available at TechLand BD, are a top-tier choice for anyone seeking superior sound quality and comfort. Crafted from durable aluminium alloy, these earphones are resistant to both scratches and smudges, ensuring they maintain their sleek appearance over time. The ergonomic fit design, complete with ear wings, guarantees a secure and comfortable fit, enhancing noise isolation and providing an immersive listening experience. The EG3 model is equipped with premium drivers that deliver a clear, balanced sound, making them ideal for extended use. One of the standout features of these earphones is their effective passive noise cancellation. The in-ear design helps to block out distracting background noise, allowing you to focus solely on your audio. Durability is further enhanced with the inclusion of a soft, anti-tangle cable, preventing any frustrating knots or snags. All controls are conveniently located at your fingertips with a sleek, compact, and easy-to-use inline control. Whether you’re listening to music, taking calls, or watching videos, the Fantech EG3 Wired Earphones, available at TechLand BD, offer an unparalleled audio experience.

ALUMINIUM ALLOY Earphones Durable aluminium alloy Earphones, with anti-scratch and anti-smudge coating
ERGONOMIC FIT DESIGN Get a comfortable secure fit with our ear wings and ergonomically designed Earphones, which also enhance noise isolation. Also includes additional ear tip sizes to match your preference.
PREMIUM DRIVERS, CLEAR SOUND EG3 is built with premium drivers to give a clear, balanced sound while remaining comfortable for long periods of time.
NOISE ISOLATION The EG3 in-ear design delivers effective passive noise cancellation. This helps block out distracting background noise to improve the listening experience.
ANTI-TANGLE AND DURABLE Designed with a durable and soft anti-tangle cable.
ALL CONTROL AT YOUR FINGERTIPS Sleek, compact, easy-to-use inline control.

In-line remote :

Compatibility :

Devices with 3.5 mm audio jack

Devices with 3.5 mm audio + microphone combined jack

Compatible With Smartphones, PC, Mac, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, and Xbox

**01 Year Warranty

Related Video :

Razer Hammerhead Duo Wired Earphone

The Razer Hammerhead Duo is a basic pair of wired earbuds, which isn’t said to disparage them: aluminum housings keep them lightweight and durable, while the braided cable combats tangling. Due to the angled nozzles and soft silicone sleeves, wearing the earbuds for extended periods of time is comfortable. Granted, I do wish the ear tips weren’t such dust magnets.What’s more, the stress relievers, particularly the one at the base of the L-shaped 3.5mm jack, aren’t very effective. Instead of ending in a plastic nub, it would be beneficial for a softer material like silicone to taper off and give the cable more support without sacrificing flexibility.

The Hammerhead Duo comes in pitch black, with dynamic bass/midrange driver and balanced armature driver for high-frequency playback at either side. The manufacturer wants to achieve a more powerful sound reproduction with less distortion here. It’s not an unusual concept, not by any means, but it’s rather rare to find such an endeavour occupying this very affordable slice of the price spectrum. The drivers are housed in a robust aluminium casing, while the earpieces can be adapted to the individual thanks to three sets of silicone ear buds.

OnePlus Type-C Bullets Earphone price in Bangladesh

Better Audio with a Built-in DAC.

We’ve crafted a listening experience that’s immersive, vibrant, and extraordinarily detailed, thanks to an advanced internal DAC with high-res audio support. The speakers are fitted with a high-quality film diaphragm that makes voices sound more realistic and immediate, and the flat-wire cables are tangle-free and threaded with tough Karbon fiber.

Stay in Control.

There’s no need to take out your phone every time you want to pause a song or answer a call, that’s what the three-button in-line remote control is for. The left and right channels reproduce sound independently, reducing noise and capturing each note perfectly. By removing the MIC signal from the channels, the quality of your phone calls is also significantly improved.

The Sound of Quality.

Before a pair of Bullets is considered ready for shipment, it has to undergo numerous rigorous quality tests. Traits like temperature resistance and plug durability are all put to the test, and only the earbuds that emerge from the tests in pristine condition are good enough for your ears.

In the EQ settings, older OnePlus devices will recognize the Type-C Bullets earphones as “others”. This does not affect the operation of the earphones.

Baseus H08 In-ear Wired 3D Gaming Earphone (Black)
description:
Baseus H08 In-ear Wired Gaming Earphone in Bangladesh
The Baseus H08 In-ear Wired Gaming Earphone in sleek black, now available at TechLand BD. Designed by the trusted brand Baseus, the H08 model is a versatile earphone suitable for gaming, music, and movie enthusiasts. With a wired connection, a 3.5mm plug type, and a generous cable length of 3.93 feet, these earphones offer flexibility and compatibility with various audio devices, making them the perfect companion for your gaming setup or daily commutes. The Baseus H08 earphones provide a stellar audio experience with a frequency response of 20Hz-20KHz and a powerful 26mm driver unit, delivering crystal-clear sound in stereo. The in-built HD microphone ensures clear communication during gaming sessions or calls. The elbow connection design adds convenience, preventing cable tangling and ensuring a comfortable fit. Crafted from durable ABS and silicon materials, these earphones boast a robust build with a weight of 400gm, promising long-lasting comfort. The black color adds a touch of sophistication to the design. While specific details about waterproof, dustproof, and shockproof features are not mentioned, the earphones are designed to withstand daily wear and tear. The Baseus H08 comes with a 1-year warranty, providing assurance for your purchase. The unique feature set includes silicon earbuds, rapid volume change, and multi-platform support, making these earphones the ultimate all-in-one audio solution. Elevate your audio experience with the Baseus H08 In-ear Wired Gaming Earphone, designed for those who demand versatility and quality in their audio accessories.
